flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Queens University of Charlotte rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.7k → $45.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Queens University of Charlotte rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.7k → $45.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Queens University of Charlotte fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Queens University of Charlotte fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
